claim_boundary: The refined model closes the Worker/Reviewer, causality, terminal-gate, and shared-engine behavior class. Overall pass additionally requires current production/test conformance; no skipped production check is counted as pass.

final_ledger_omits_hygiene: final ledgers must include final artifact hygiene closure rows
final_ledger_omits_supplemental: final ledgers must include supplemental repair closure rows
fourth_round_pm_packet_opened: runtime must stop instead of opening a fourth supplemental repair round
hygiene_category_missing: final artifact hygiene repair items require hygiene_category
hygiene_gap_not_contractualized: required final artifact hygiene gap requires PM supplemental repair contract
mismatched_repair_evidence: repair evidence must match the supplemental contract, item, and owner repair node
mismatched_shared_engine_handoff: Reviewer handoff must consume the matching current shared-engine receipt
missing_repair_item_owner: supplemental repair items require owner repair nodes
missing_route_node_projection: repair route nodes must project supplemental contract and item ids
missing_shared_engine_receipt: terminal repair requires a current shared-engine receipt after Worker evidence
Reviewer handoff must consume the matching current shared-engine receipt
missing_supplemental_contract: terminal gap repair requires PM supplemental contract
missing_worker_repair_packet: terminal substantive repair requires a Worker task packet, not a Reviewer repair packet
Worker repair packet must be created after the supplemental contract
missing_worker_repair_result: terminal substantive repair requires a fresh Worker-owned result after the repair packet
optional_hygiene_note_blocks: optional hygiene notes must not block closure unless PM imports them
original_contract_mutated: terminal supplemental repair must not mutate frozen original contract
pre_contract_repair_evidence: Worker repair packet must be created after the supplemental contract
repair evidence must be created after supplemental contract generation
repair_bypasses_existing_gates: supplemental repair nodes must reuse existing FlowPilot gates
reviewer_only_substantive_repair: terminal substantive repair requires a Worker task packet, not a Reviewer repair packet
terminal substantive repair requires a fresh Worker-owned result after the repair packet
terminal repair result requires a distinct Reviewer after Worker execution
terminal_replay_omits_hygiene_segment: terminal backward replay must include final artifact hygiene segment
terminal_replay_omits_supplemental: terminal backward replay must include supplemental repair segments
worker_self_reviews_repair: terminal repair result requires a distinct Reviewer after Worker execution
wrong_terminal_gate: terminal repair must return through the same terminal backward-replay gate

production_conformance.claim_boundary: This is current source/test conformance, not a skipped check. Missing Worker dispatch, generation binding, or terminal shared-engine/gate regression evidence keeps the runner red.
